    "R1.5": "The delegation is unambiguously a structural task. The artifact exhibits a badly interleaved order — training setup appears first, then related work is sandwiched mid-text, then more experimental protocol, and the principal contribution (the value-of-information gating rule) is revealed last rather than foregrounded. Reordering these blocks into a coherent narrative arc (contribution → motivation/related work → methods → experiments) is the entire delegated job and is load-bearing: failure to reorder leaves the delegation unexecuted."

rationale.R1.5: The delegation is unambiguously a structural task. The artifact exhibits a badly interleaved order — training setup appears first, then related work is sandwiched mid-text, then more experimental protocol, and the principal contribution (the value-of-information gating rule) is revealed last rather than foregrounded. Reordering these blocks into a coherent narrative arc (contribution → motivation/related work → methods → experiments) is the entire delegated job and is load-bearing: failure to reorder leaves the delegation unexecuted.
